titles.en: Chapter 59 – The Penalty (Hadd) is not inherited
Chapter 59 – The Penalty (Hadd) is not inherited

segments: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ إِنَّ الْحَدَّ لَا يُورَثُ كَمَا تُورَثُ الدِّيَةُ وَ الْمَالُ وَ الْعَقَارُ وَ لَكِنْ مَنْ قَامَ بِهِ مِنَ الْوَرَثَةِ فَطَلَبَهُ فَهُوَ وَلِيُّهُ وَ مَنْ تَرَكَهُ فَلَمْ يَطْلُبْهُ فَلَا حَقَّ لَهُ وَ ذَلِكَ مِثْلُ رَجُلٍ قَذَفَ رَجُلًا وَ لِلْمَقْذُوفِ أَخٌ فَإِنْ عَفَا عَنْهُ أَحَدُهُمَا كَانَ لِلْآخَرِ أَنْ يَطْلُبَهُ بِحَقِّهِ لِأَنَّهَا أُمُّهُمَا جَمِيعاً وَ الْعَفْوُ لَهُمَا جَمِيعاً .
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ إِنَّ الْحَدَّ لَا يُورَثُ كَمَا تُورَثُ الدِّيَةُ وَ الْمَالُ وَ الْعَقَارُ وَ لَكِنْ مَنْ قَامَ بِهِ مِنَ الْوَرَثَةِ فَطَلَبَهُ فَهُوَ وَلِيُّهُ وَ مَنْ تَرَكَهُ فَلَمْ يَطْلُبْهُ فَلَا حَقَّ لَهُ وَ ذَلِكَ مِثْلُ رَجُلٍ قَذَفَ رَجُلًا وَ لِلْمَقْذُوفِ أَخٌ فَإِنْ عَفَا عَنْهُ أَحَدُهُمَا كَانَ لِلْآخَرِ أَنْ يَطْلُبَهُ بِحَقِّهِ لِأَنَّهَا أُمُّهُمَا جَمِيعاً وَ الْعَفْوُ لَهُمَا جَمِيعاً .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Mahboub, from Hisham Bin Salim, from Ammar Al Sabaty,

(The narrator) says, ‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying that the Penalty (Hadd) is not inheritance just as the wergil is inherited, and the wealth, and the real estate. But the one from the inheritors stands by it, so he seeks it, so he is his guardian (has a right to do so), and the one who leaves it and does not seek it, so there is no right for him, and that is similar to a man who slanders a man, and for the slandered one is a brother. So if one of the two were to excuse him (the slanderer), that would be (a right) for the other one to seek his right, because she is a mother to both of them together, and the excusing is for both of them together’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Mahboub, from Hisham Bin Salim, from Ammar Al Sabaty, (The narrator) says, ‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying that the Penalty (Hadd) is not inheritance just as the wergil is inherited, and the wealth, and the real estate. But the one from the inheritors stands by it, so he seeks it, so he is his guardian (has a right to do so), and the one who leaves it and does not seek it, so there is no right for him, and that is similar to a man who slanders a man, and for the slandered one is a brother. So if one of the two were to excuse him (the slanderer), that would be (a right) for the other one to seek his right, because she is a mother to both of them together, and the excusing is for both of them together’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ سَالِمٍ عَنْ عَمَّارٍ السَّابَاطِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter 59 – The Penalty (Hadd) is not inherited

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,
Abu Abdullahasws has said: ‘The Penalty (Hadd) is not inherited’.
en.hubeali.text: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny, Abu Abdullahasws has said: ‘The Penalty (Hadd) is not inherited’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ النَّوْفَلِيِّ عَنِ السَّكُونِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
